---
title: "News"
page-layout: full
---

## Updates

This page tracks concise documentation and release updates.

- [GitHub releases](https://github.com/arnabaich96/CausalMixGPD/releases)
- [GitHub commits](https://github.com/arnabaich96/CausalMixGPD/commits)

## Current doc structure

- Quarto is the curated front door for workflows and architecture.
- pkgdown is the primary API and article reference.

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [Roadmap](roadmap.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
